---
title: "Polybius Lives! Parts 1 and 2 Bibliography"
author: "Jack LaRoche"
date: "2026-02-28"
categories: [QAA, Bibliography, Urban Legends, Video Games]
---

# Polybius Lives! Bibliography

![](thumbnail.jpeg)

**Coin-Operated Americans: Rebooting Boyhood at the Video Game Arcade**
Carly A. Kocurek

**Attract Mode: The Rise and Fall of Coin-Op Arcade Games**
Jamie Lendino

**Joystick Soldiers: The Politics of Play in Military Video Games**
Nina B. Huntemann

**Arcade**
Robert Maxxe

**Polybius**
Collin Armstrong

[Retro Bitch](https://www.retro-bitch.com)

[CoinOp.org](https://www.coinop.org)
